name: some-thread-first
expansion_description: IIFE: const _t0 = x; if (_t0 == null) return _t0; const _t1 = f(_t0); if (_t1 == null) return _t1; return g(_t1);

name: some-thread-last
expansion_description: IIFE: const _t0 = x; if null return; const _t1 = f(a, _t0); if null return; return g(b, _t1);
